programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Asuntos pendientes
programme.desc: Danny y Maria buscan a un veterano con posible estrés postraumático. Frank es sorprendido en una conferencia de prensa por una mujer que busca justicia para su hija asesinada.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Reinas de Manhattan
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una reina drag en un parque local. Erin reabre un caso de drogas tras ser secuestrada por la madre del acusado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Secretos abiertos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de una joven trae recuerdos dolorosos a Danny, quien trabajó en un caso similar sin resolver hace años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Palabras que hieren
programme.desc: Danny busca a una mujer que amenaza con suicidarse junto al responsable de la muerte de sus padres. Frank acompaña a su nieto en una excursión escolar y lucha por conectar.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: En Kansas ha habido una serie de tornados donde han sido encontrados cuerpos de adolescentes desmembrados. La UAC es llamada para investigar. Mientras, JJ está preocupada, ya que su hijo Henry había estado enfermo y quería estar con él

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un caso se vuelve personal para García cuando la UAC investiga la desaparición de una mujer, en su grupo de apoyo a sobrevivientes, cuya hija desapareció hace siete años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble trabajo
programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo nocturno de un especialista en polígrafos del NCIS toma un giro peligroso, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo tienen que descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he's caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A hit and run call results in the intoxicated suspect being coaxed out of his car at gun-point. Officers respond to a stabbing and the victim is rushed to the hospital by paramedics. Officers give a tour of a newly renovated jail in Maricopa County, AZ.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a suspended license flees a routine traffic stop on foot. Deputies respond to a battered woman after receiving a 911 hang up call. A sting operation nets a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends in a foot chase. Stolen property is found in a suspect’s car during a traffic stop. An altercation ends with a brick being tossed at a victim’s car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife tries to evade police by hiding in bushes. Vice unit officers conduct a prostitution sting. When officers are shot at during a pursuit, the woman claims it was flashes from a camera.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disturbed naked man is spotted in a park covered in blood. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects lead officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.desc: When Stokes learns that a man he helped put in prison is going to have his conviction overturned, the CSI team needs to prove the killer is guilty again or he will be released.

programme.desc: When a bomb kills an off-road race truck driver mid-race, the CSI team is called on the scene to investigate why.

programme.desc: The CSI team investigates three dead bodies just blocks away from a campaign dinner, they think they know who the killer is before making a shocking discovery.

programme.desc: The CSIs arrive at their favorite diner only to discover a gruesome crime scene with eight dead victims and a lot of questions.

programme.desc: When a girl is shot and killed at a large rave in the desert, the CSI team has to search for clues, find her missing friend and bring the killer to justice.

programme.desc: When a K-9 is blamed for the death of his partner, the CSI team discovers there's more to the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a reverend who was killed at the grave site of former CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Stokes se entera de que se anulará la condena de un hombre al que ayudó a encarcelar, el equipo de CSI debe probar nuevamente que el asesino es culpable o será liberado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba mata a un conductor de camión de carreras todoterreno en mitad de la carrera, se llama al equipo de CSI a la escena para investigar por qué.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga tres cadáveres a pocas cuadras de una cena de campaña, ellos creen saber quién es el asesino antes de hacer un descubrimiento impactante.

programme.desc: La nieta de DB Russell fue secuestrada al final de la temporada 12 y ahora él dirige al equipo de CSI en una búsqueda para encontrarla, en el estreno de la temporada 13.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI llega a su restaurante favorito solo para descubrir una espantosa escena del crimen con ocho víctimas muertas y muchas preguntas.

programme.desc: Cuando una joven es asesinada a tiros en una gran rave en el desierto, el equipo de CSI tiene que buscar pistas, encontrar a su amiga desaparecida y llevar al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una famosa historiadora de música es asesinada y dejada dentro de un piano, tiene un efecto emocional en Sanders, quien tuvo un pasado con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se culpa a un perro policía por la muerte de su compañero, el equipo de CSI descubre que hay más en el caso.

programme.desc: Las cosas se vuelven personales cuando D.B. Russell se ve envuelto en la investigación de la muerte del entrenador de baloncesto de su hijo.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un reverendo que fue asesinado en la tumba del ex CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran cinco cuerpos en lo que parece ser un área de meteoritos en medio del desierto, CSI Finlay reconoce a una de las víctimas, lo que la lleva a visitar su pasado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI echa una mano a la policía local con varios arrestos hasta que se encuentra a un desconocido muerto en un automóvil. Además, las cosas se vuelven personales para el Capitán Brass cuando descubre algunos datos sobre su hija.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En un accidente aéreo muy cercano a la franja de Las Vegas mueren cinco personas y el equipo de CSI acude para investigar.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una destacada presentadora de noticias durante una transmisión en vivo.

programme.desc: Bizarre occurrences begin to plague the CSIs as they hunt down a serial killer who struck during a total eclipse of the sun.

programme.desc: When a model is electrocuted on the runway, the case leads Horatio and the CSI team back to Horatio’s son and his nemesis.

programme.desc: When a rare and illegal machine gun vaporizes three weapons' smugglers, the CSIs must find the killer before the gun causes more deaths.

programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga un bar clandestino inspirado en la década de 1920 cuando asesinan a uno de sus dueños y desaparecen 10.000 dólares.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)

programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Mi sangriento Valentín (S9 Ep16)
programme.desc: En el Día de San Valentín, el detective Mac Taylor y el resto del equipo de CSI de Nueva York abordan tres retorcidas historias de amor que salieron mal.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: La vida es hoy (S9 Ep17)
programme.desc: El malestar de la comunidad debido a un policía que mató a un hombre desarmado obliga a Mac y al equipo de CSI de Nueva York a actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español

programme.desc: Al torpe inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) se le asigna un importante caso, pero se enamora de la principal sospechosa (Elke Sommer), aumentan los cadáveres y Clouseau debe darse prisa por encontrar al verdadero culpable o su carrera acabará.

programme.title: Estallido mortal
programme.desc: Mientras graba sonidos en exteriores, un técnico de efectos sonoros (John Travolta) captura el mortal accidente de un candidato a la presidencia. Pero, ¿el sonido que oyó fue el estallido de un neumático o el disparo de un asesino?

programme.title: El tren del infierno
programme.desc: Mientras un tren atraviesa las Montañas Rocosas, los pasajeros están siendo asesinados. La única esperanza es John Deakin, el cual descubre un secreto que explota en un torrente de revelaciones impactantes, peleas y tiroteos explosivos.

programme.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang
programme.desc: Dick Van Dyke interpreta a un excéntrico inventor que crea un extraordinario coche que conduce por tierra, mar y aire, y que le lleva con sus hijos y su novia (Sally Ann Howes) a un mundo mágico de aventuras sin fin. ¡Un clásico para la familia!

programme.title: Llega un jinete libre y salvaje
programme.desc: En el Viejo Oeste de los años 40, dos ganaderos de poca monta se alían para hacer frente a los estragos de un terrateniente despiadado que pretende ampliar su imperio a cualquier precio. Protagonizada por Jane Fonda, James Caan y Jason Robards.

programme.title: La maldición de la Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: Del legendario director Blake Edwards, esta encantadora comedia gira entorno a la más ineficiente de las búsquedas del detective más inepto de Francia. Protagonizada por Ted Wass, Herbert Lom, David Niven, Capucine, Burt Kwouk y Robert Loggia.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Manhattan en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando una viuda seductora le pide a un periodista que resuelva la misteriosa muerte de su marido, la investigación lo sumerge en un peligroso mundo de adulterio, chantaje y asesinato.

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.desc: Corazón valiente, la detallada y feroz saga de combate, amor tierno y la voluntad de arriesgarlo todo por la libertad. Película de Mel Gibson, ganadora del Premio de la Academia®. En una actuación cargada de emociones.

programme.title: Días de trueno
programme.desc: Tim Daland descubre a Cole y lo pone en el equipo liderado por el legendario Harry Hogge para ir por la Copa NASCAR en el Daytona 500. Un choque casi acaba con la carrera de Cole y debe recurrir a una hermosa doctora para recuperar el valor.

programme.title: Contra las cuerdas
programme.desc: Contra las cuerdas presenta a Meg Ryan como Kallen. Una osada y estridente entrenadora de boxeo decidida a cambiar Luther Shaw “Lethal” (Omar Epps) de ser un hombre punk de la calle a convertirse en el ganador mundial del boxeo.

programme.title: Todo por ganar
programme.desc: Un entrenador de baloncesto universitario se ve obligado a saltarse las normas para conseguir los jugadores que necesita para seguir siendo competitivo.

programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.desc: Cuando su mentor, el almirante James Greer, se enferma, Ryan es nombrado director en funciones de la CIA.

programme.desc: When Archie's brother, Fred, visits Archie to open up a business, he also brings his 18 year old wife, Katherine. Both, Archie and Edith, and even Stephanie, are shocked as they find out. Archie and Fred argue about Katherine's age.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Stephanie's father, Floyd, finally arrives with a devastating proposition for the Bunkers: They can keep Stephanie if they agree to pay him $1000 cash!

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: It's Edith and Archie Bunker's 22nd wedding anniversary and their daughter Gloria and her husband Mike are planning a surprise Sunday brunch. Edith is pleasantly surprised, however, Archie's 'no big deal' attitude leads to a huge argument.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike writes a letter to President Nixon protesting everything that's wrong with America, including the state of the environment and the nation's involvement in Vietnam. Archie finds out, and he decides he also will write a letter to Tricky Dick.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is set to go down to the blood bank to donate some blood and asks Archie if he would like to donate.

programme.desc: For a lawyer, Oliver should be more careful about what he signs. Lisa reminds him that two years ago Oliver made her a promise to take her back to New York for a two-week vacation. And she has it in writing… on the bottom of the kitchen drawer.

programme.desc: It's hard to know who has a curse over Oliver, but he sure has his hands full with Lisa and her fellow Hungarian Lazlo Broslav. Lazlo appears with a letter claiming he once saved the life of Lisa's uncle, and now her family must repay the debt.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: There's a problem in Hooterville: no farmer seems able to grow a cash crop on account of the quality of the soil. But as it turns out from Oliver's (Eddie Albert) soil and mineral research, the oft-misunderstood rutabaga is an ideal choice.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres goes Hollywood in this first installment of a two-part season finale. When Arnold the pig appears in a play at the Hooterville Theater, Lisa (Eva Gabor) arranges for an old friend to give Arnold a chance on the big screen.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A charity rummage sale asks for donated clothing. Being among the wealthier residents of Hooterville, the organizers look to the Douglases. It isn't long before Oliver has to stop Lisa from giving away his entire wardrobe!

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Dana becomes determined to prove her worth after being disciplined for fighting fellow troops; the Earth forces fight back against the Robotech Masters' bid to take over the protoculture factory.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Marie Crystal and Dana lead a Robotech defense team into space to restore communication with a vital outpost taken over by the Masters; Dana confronts the bioroid from her visions.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Dana and Bowie fight a group of bioroids against a direct order from command, leading to Bowie's capture and a disturbing confrontation between Dana and an alien pilot; the Masters send teams to scour the wreckage of the SDF-1.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Manchas delatoras
programme.desc: La policía instituyó una búsqueda intensa cuando la madre de dos niños pequeños desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, el cuerpo de la universitaria Laura Salmon fue encontrado en una granja de Tennessee, cubierto con sus propios jeans y los jeans del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1980, Shannon Mohr, residente de Michigan, murió en lo que su nuevo esposo, David Davis, reportó que fue un accidente al montar a caballo. Después de su muerte, la familia de Shannon informó que Davis parecía estar lejos de estar agobiado por el dolor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En algún momento durante una fiesta de Navidad en el vecindario, Melissa Brannen, de cinco años, desapareció. Los investigadores recurrieron a la ciencia forense para ayudarlos a ver lo que se perdieron los testigos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un corredor de bolsa exitoso no regresa a casa después de su turno, su esposa lo reporta como desaparecido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: According to new evidence, the Woolly Mammoth went on roaming until about the time the Pyramids were built.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Are sparrows and blackbirds the direct descendents of a vicious group of dinosaurs including the velociraptor?

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The earth split in India 66 million years ago in a disaster that may have caused the end of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: Anatomist Professor Alice Roberts and biologist Dr George McGavin go on an extraordinary evolutionary journey to meet our ancient ancestors. They start with our closest prehistoric relative, a Neanderthal.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team go back 1.5 million years to meet one of the earliest humans, Homo erectus. They walked the earth far longer than any other human species and were the first ancestors to look a lot like we do today.

programme.desc: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German shepard who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog develops an aggression problem after moving to a new area; a big dog does not let people near her owner; a beagle sniffs continually.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog becomes aggressive when he sees other dogs; a Newfoundland does not eat; a dog runs out of the house whenever the door opens.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jackie discovers her father is listed as "unknown" on her birth certificate. Alexis buys the company planning to publish Caress' book. Fighting for his empire, Blake must endure the devastating lies of the one woman bent on his destruction -- Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's hopes for victory are crushed by a drunken witness; Bart is dropped as a senatorial candidate; the woman who can clear Blake's name is forced to conceal her identity.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake loses the trial and now fears losing Denver-Carrington; Ben and Alexis pit themselves against Blake and Caress; Garrett learns that he is Jackie's father; a reporter's lies intensify the battle between Alexis and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress discovers Emily and Ben's secret and Blake is double-crossed by an old friend. Alexis schemes to turn the Chinese government against Blake; Claudia threatens to reveal Adam's power of attorney over Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is tricked into borrowing money from Alexis; Jackie returns home to some shocking news; Blake learns the identity of the woman who can save his reputation; ignored by family and taunted by a reporter, Amanda attempts suicide.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The guilt-ridden Alexis fears she is too late when she finds Amanda unconscious; Dominique proposes to Garrett; Steven believes he may lose Danny to Sammy Jo and Clay; Ben makes special plans for Caress and Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Successfully proving Blake and Alexis dishonorable, Ben is given control of the South China Sea leases; Steven attempts to uncover Adam's secret; Dominique's wedding day approaches; Sammy Jo and Clay find romance by candlelight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis's life is spared as Krystle is able to restrain Blake's lethal temper; as La Mirage burns, Amanda is rescued by a mysterious stranger; Claudia is claimed victim by the ravaging flames.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An incensed Blake discovers the morning headlines accusing him of murder and arson; Adam offers his loyalties to Alexis and Colbyco; Alexis acquires enough stock to assume control of Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake fires the La Mirage manager for withholding crucial information regarding the fire; Alexis offers a reward for the arrest and conviction of the arsonist; Michael Culhane continues to romance Amanda.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's trip to Caracas to free Caress proves unsuccessful; Dex's proposal of marriage to Alexis is rejected; Blake catches Michael Culhane and Amanda in a passionate embrace and immediately fires the promiscuous chauffeur.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: The Bodyguard from Beijing [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A corrupt businessman commits a murder and the only witness is the girlfriend of another businessman with close connections to the Chinese government.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: Wild Hunters

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las peleas en la Villa no cesan. Asaf prueba más labios y el corazon de Lilian se parte. Más Ex se van mientras que la ultima en llegar, espera en la Love Suite. La Sala Tornado llama a Brandon y repite la historia, pero ahora con Queen.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In a battle with organized crime, the IMF sets up a bizarre mind-transfer experiment to convince a syndicate leader he is being double-crossed on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF turns itself into a surgical team to operate on a tyrannical ruler who has imprisoned the rightful king, his twin brother, on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.desc: To head off a threatened atomic blast, Jim Phelps gains entry to a top secret nuclear plant by posing as a temperamental artist with guest star Barbara Luna as his model on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.desc: As a doctor with a startling new treatment for amnesia, Jim Phelps forces Paris to relive another man's past when the IMF pushes a search for stolen nuclear material on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
